about.title: About AWAKE
about.subtitle: Global coffee market intelligence. Based in Baku, for the world.
about.mission: To compile, analyze, and distribute comprehensive coffee market intelligence from authoritative international sources. We believe transparent access to production, trade, and price data serves the entire coffee value chain — from smallholder farmers to institutional traders.
about.story: AWAKE was established to address the growing need for accessible coffee market data in the Caspian region and beyond. We aggregate historical and current datasets from the International Coffee Organization, World Bank, USDA Production Supply & Distribution, FAOSTAT, and UN Comtrade to provide a unified view of the global coffee economy. Our directory maps Azerbaijan's emerging specialty coffee scene, connecting local roasters and sellers with the broader market.
about.value_1: All statistics are sourced from verified, open-access datasets maintained by authoritative international institutions.
about.value_2: Deep understanding of Azerbaijan's coffee landscape — the roasters, importers, and the growing specialty culture across the region.
about.value_3: Market intelligence should be accessible. We compile and present global coffee data free of charge to support informed decision-making.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: For data inquiries, partnership opportunities, or directory listing requests.

services_page.title: Services & Capabilities
services_page.subtitle: Data intelligence, technology solutions, and strategic advisory for the global coffee industry.
services_page.data_intelligence_desc: Custom market models, price forecasting, trade flow visualization, and automated reporting. We process data from the ICO, World Bank, USDA, FAOSTAT, and UN Comtrade to deliver actionable insights for traders, roasters, and policymakers.
services_page.software_desc: End-to-end software development — web platforms, APIs, data pipelines, and monitoring systems. Modern architecture deployed to edge networks worldwide.
services_page.ai_desc: Predictive analytics, demand forecasting, quality grading automation, and natural language interfaces for coffee market data. Custom models trained on industry-specific datasets.
services_page.infrastructure_desc: Secure, scalable hosting and data storage. API access to market data feeds. Custom dashboards and monitoring solutions for real-time operations.
services_page.consulting_desc: Market entry strategy, supply chain optimization, sourcing partnerships, and competitive intelligence. Leveraging our network across 70+ producing countries and 140+ importing markets.

prices.title: Coffee Prices

prices.source: Source: World Bank Commodity Price Data (Pink Sheet), International Coffee Organization
